title: China-to-Tanzania BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Site-Specific Interconnection
rows.target_requirement: Tanzania electricity regulation relies on EWURA electricity regulatory tools, including grid and distribution codes where applicable. Tanzania and China both use a 50 Hz power-system basis, which helps screen PCS, transformer, HVAC, and auxiliary-load compatibility, but it does not decide interconnection approval. Tanzania site review may require protection settings, voltage and frequency operating windows, anti-islanding, fault ride-through, harmonics, grounding, SCADA, metering, communications, commissioning tests, and site acceptance.
target_standards: EWURA electricity regulatory tools
Electricity (Grid and Distribution Codes) Rules, 2017 where applicable
Project-specific utility interconnection and commissioning requirements
rows.china_equivalent: GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence and China 50 Hz design settings may support engineering review, but they are not Tanzania utility approval. PCS firmware, transformer taps, relay settings, harmonic limits, grounding, ambient-temperature derating, and SCADA should be validated for the Tanzania site.
rows.gap: Produce Tanzania-specific relay settings, grid model, power-quality study, short-circuit study, SCADA protocol, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records instead of relying only on China factory settings.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where Tanzania utility interconnection, grid-code, EWURA, EPC, owner, insurer, or commissioning approval applies; details are project and connection-point specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match is useful engineering context, not a Tanzania interconnection approval. Site-specific settings and commissioning remain separate requirements.

source.publisher: Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA)

rows.requirement: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline vs Tanzania Acceptance
rows.target_requirement: Tanzania acceptance should be confirmed through the specific TBS import route, Tanzania standard, IEC evidence request, EWURA or utility review, project contract, owner, insurer, lender, and fire / building inspection route. A China GB report may be useful technical evidence, but it is not automatically a TBS CoC, IEC 62619 report, IEC 62933 system report, EWURA approval, grid-code approval, or Tanzania fire-safety approval.
target_standards: TBS PVoC / CoC and destination-inspection routes where applicable
IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 series where requested
EWURA electricity licensing, registration, and regulatory tools where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: The China BESS baseline commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage, and GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage system technical requirements.
rows.gap: Build a standards crosswalk from GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 to the exact IEC, TZS, TBS, EWURA, utility, fire, and contract requirements. Identify which evidence is formal IEC / TBS-accepted evidence, which is only technically comparable, and which items need Tanzania-side approval.

mandatory_status.target: China GB evidence is not mandatory in Tanzania unless a Tanzania authority, TBS route, project document, owner, utility, insurer, lender, or contract specifically accepts or requires it; Tanzania obligations depend on the applicable import, project, grid, fire, and contract path
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended national standards unless incorporated by regulation or contract

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 as China baseline evidence, not as automatic Tanzania compliance. Acceptance must be confirmed by the specific TBS, PVoC, EWURA, utility, fire, transport, customs, or contract path.

source.publisher: Standardization Administration of China / State Administration for Market Regulation

rows.requirement: EWURA Electricity Licensing, Registration, Storage, and Grid Review
rows.target_requirement: EWURA states that the Electricity Act requires persons intending to undertake generation, transmission, distribution, supply, system operation, electricity trade, or electrical installation activities to apply for a licence unless exempted. EWURA also states that electricity activities above 1 MW are licensed and those below 1 MW are registered. EWURA's public licensing page still references LOIS for online applications, while any March-2026 replacement by an EWURA e-Service portal should be confirmed on the live portal before filing. A BESS used for generation integration, grid support, distribution, supply, mini-grid, customer supply, or electricity trading may therefore require EWURA licensing or registration, utility review, grid-code compliance, construction / commissioning approval, and project-specific interconnection studies.
target_standards: Electricity Act, Cap 131
EWURA electricity licensing and registration route
EWURA online licensing / e-Service application portal, current route to be confirmed before filing
EWURA electricity regulatory tools, including grid and distribution codes where applicable
rows.china_equivalent: China-side factory certificates, GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence, grid simulation files, relay settings, and commissioning records can support technical review but do not establish Tanzania licensing, registration, grid interconnection, tariff, PPA, land, environmental, fire, or operating approval.
china_standards: Project-specific China grid and commissioning evidence
rows.gap: Separate product import compliance from project authorization. Prepare a Tanzania regulatory memo showing whether the BESS is behind-the-meter, grid-connected, generation-integrated, distribution-connected, mini-grid, stand-alone, or used for supply / trading, then identify EWURA, utility, PPA, land, environmental, fire, construction, and commissioning approvals before energization.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS activity falls within Tanzania electricity licensing, registration, electrical installation, grid-code, supply, trading, mini-grid, or project-approval requirements; not a universal standalone product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic grid and project approvals are not substitutes for Tanzania EWURA / utility / project approvals

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] EWURA and utility obligations should be scoped by the Tanzania project use case. TBS CoC, IEC evidence, or China GB reports do not by themselves authorize a grid-connected or licensed BESS activity.

source.publisher: Energy and Water Utilities Regulatory Authority (EWURA)

rows.requirement: Fire and Rescue Force Inspection and BESS Installation Fire Safety
rows.target_requirement: Tanzania's Fire and Rescue Force publishes fire and rescue legislation, building inspection regulations, inspection rules, and public-safety services including fire inspection. BESS installation approval is site-specific, so project owners should prepare fire-protection design, battery layout, separation distances, thermal-runaway mitigation, ventilation or gas detection where relevant, emergency shutdown logic, monitoring, access, signage, training, and emergency response procedures for review by the owner, insurer, local authority, and Fire and Rescue Force route.
target_standards: Fire and Rescue Act 2007
Fire and Rescue Service Building Inspection Regulations 2015
Fire and Rescue Force inspection rules and public-safety services
rows.china_equivalent: China commonly uses GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support a Tanzania installation dossier but do not replace Tanzania fire inspection, building inspection, insurer, owner, or local-authority acceptance.
rows.gap: A battery safety test report is not an installation fire approval. Build a Tanzania site package with drawings, hazard analysis, emergency response plan, fire detection and suppression concept, ventilation / gas control rationale, shutdown procedures, maintenance plan, and commissioning records.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Tanzania fire, building-inspection, local-authority, owner, insurer, EPC, or commissioning approval applies; details are site-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, GB 44240-2024 scope, and local fire review

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat BESS fire safety as a Tanzania site approval package, not just a product certificate. China GB evidence can support, but not replace, local fire and building-inspection review.

rows.requirement: TBS PVoC / CoC and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence
rows.target_requirement: TBS implements product conformity assessment for certain categories of imported goods. For goods subject to PVoC, TBS states that consignments must obtain mandatory customs-clearance documents and a Certificate of Conformity before shipment, otherwise goods arriving at Tanzanian ports may be rejected or fined. For BESS, confirm the HS code and regulated status of battery racks, lithium cells or modules, PCS / inverters, containers, switchgear, cables, and controls. IEC 62619:2022 battery safety evidence and IEC 62933 electrical-energy-storage-system evidence may be requested where the applicable Tanzania standard, PVoC route, tender, project owner, insurer, lender, utility, or EWURA review calls them up.
target_standards: TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC)
TBS Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for regulated imported goods
IEC 62933 series
rows.china_equivalent: China BESS files commonly include GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports. These can support a Tanzania technical file, but they do not by themselves establish TBS PVoC status, CoC acceptance, IEC-format testing, HS-code treatment, or Tanzania project approval.
rows.gap: Before shipment, classify each BESS component by HS code, check the current TBS PVoC and destination-inspection lists, and ask the selected PVoC service provider whether China GB evidence is acceptable only as support or whether IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 reports are required for the shipment or project.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS component falls within TBS-regulated PVoC or destination-inspection goods; IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence is mandatory only where called up by the applicable Tanzania standard, PVoC route, authority, utility, tender, insurer, lender, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation or contract

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China GB report clears Tanzania import conformity. Confirm TBS-regulated status by HS code and obtain CoC / IEC evidence where the Tanzania route requires it.

rows.target_requirement: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Tanzania should have UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 evidence and a test summary available through the transport chain. BESS shipments commonly move by sea, so IMDG dangerous-goods classification, SDS, packaging, marks, emergency information, and carrier or port requirements should be aligned with the exact cell, module, battery rack, or container configuration shipped.
target_standards: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
IMDG Code for maritime dangerous goods transport
UN 38.3 test-summary availability through the transport chain
rows.china_equivalent: China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are battery safety evidence, not dangerous-goods transport evidence. China export logistics files should reconcile the actual design revision, model, chemistry, capacity, and protection design with the tested UN 38.3 design type.
rows.gap: Before booking, verify the UN 38.3 report, test summary, SDS, dangerous-goods declaration, packing instruction, emergency contact, state-of-charge controls where relevant, and carrier / port acceptance for the exact Tanzania-bound shipment.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery dangerous-goods transport where UN model rules and modal sea, air, road, port, carrier, customs, or freight-forwarder practice apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for China export transport acceptance where lithium batteries are offered for transport under dangerous-goods rules

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Tanzania import or project evidence and China GB battery reports do not replace UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods transport documents for lithium BESS shipments.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)
